generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent surge in threats makes it clear we need modern tools to keep our communities safe. While some worry about civil liberties, responsible expansion of security measures has always been part of our duty to protect. #NationalSecurityFirst
